author: @erikberg8098
text:
The Original Series, TNG, DS9, Voyager and Enterprise could bring up edgy & bold ideas without alienating or dividing their audiences.  Strange New Worlds is the best of modern trek but it’s still uneven.  As a TNG-era Trekkie I watched it free on YouTube and, while it wasn’t as hard to watch as Disco, it was still hard to watch.  The only mystery is which new characters are going to come out as LGBTQ+…. My money is the Klingon medical student…not that I’ll be watching….

If they want me back they can actually do that post-Picard Season 3 series “Legacy”…at least there I have a few characters I’m actually interested in…

author: @dustinherk8124
text: the entire crew (and show) of Discovery should of been what Academy is now. they time skipped how many centuries? imagine taking a ship captain from the 1200's and giving him command of a ww2 destroyer. the man would be utterly lost on technologies, tactics, diplomatic relations, just utterly useless. but the disco crew took what?..half a day to learn everything learn everything during the Disco refit. THIS is where Academy should of taken place, along side the disco crew to catch them the hell up on EVERYTHING. none of the crew should be actual teachers, except as maybe early federation historians. No Tig, no Tilly, no fucking nothing. S3 of disco should of been what academy is trying to be, with a spin off LATER with this crew group.

author: @QuinnMallory-od1hw
text:
I'm amazed it's rotten tomatoes score is 43%, that seems too high, are they removing reviews again? Or paying for good audience feedback? Regardless I've seen episode 1 and 2, it's a 3 out of 10 from me.

at least 3 characters imho need to be deleted completely with immediate effect. The hologram girl simply horrible, the woman on the bridge with the "teachable moments" line, looks like the villian out of matilda and the girl who swallowed a com badge.

Characters that need explanation or revision in elements. The Klingon, if he were a quarter human like Alexander- worf's son or even like Torres from voyager. The captain needs to be less kooky and better lines. Betaziods need hand signs?

 Characters they got right, the jemadar was awesome but would like her to use that cloaking ability, khlonian looks interesting, the main black kid as he is ok at the moment but please don't become Michael burnham for God's sake, the betazoid siblings. The doctor should be allowed to addlip abit more. The klinarite as a villian is adequate. 

I feel they are a bit light on villains especially if their stranded on earth. Furthermore because the main character cannot leave the academy we don't see any of earth 31st century or even the solar system??? Big issue.

What's Missing a picard like cadet, a Wesley crusher type, cyborg?
